title: hibbertia scandens var. novoguineensis
intro: Hibbertia scandens var. novoguineensis is a rare and lesser-known variety of the hibbertia plant, a flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. It is native to Papua New Guinea and is also known as the 'New Guinea Guinea flower'. The medicinal properties of Hibbertia scandens var. novoguineensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function, and can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for medicinal use.
